title: Senior Software Engineer - Medlife Advisory Limited - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Medlife Advisory Limited - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Join the Medlife Advisory Limited family as a Senior Software Engineer in Madurai. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Medlife Advisory Limited:
Medlife Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Go

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Medlife Advisory Limited!
